_comment: Reference config from the OpenClaw Optimization Guide. Last refreshed 2026-04-21 for OpenClaw 2026.4.15 stable. Copy to ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json (or your project root) and edit. Never commit real credentials — use env var references like ${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY}. Apr 21 refresh notes: (1) MCP threat model — if you add MCP plugin entries, also set agents.defaults.subprocess.envScrub=true on 2026.4.19-beta.1+ and scope per-agent `mcp.allowed` (see Part 33); (2) Opus 4.7 regression watch — see the primary/fallback block below for the recommended posture.

primary._comment: `opus` alias resolves to Claude Opus 4.7 in OpenClaw 2026.4.15 stable. Do NOT pin the fully-qualified string `claude-opus-4-7` on 2026.4.15 — it was missed from the registry (issue #68241). Leave the alias, or move to 2026.4.19-beta.1+. APR 21 REGRESSION CAVEAT: operators running production work are pinning primary to `opus-4-6` instead and keeping 4.7 as fallback[0] until the 4.7 quality issues resolve. Flip `primary` and `fallback[0]` below if that's your posture. See Part 6.

fallback._comment: Intentionally above cheaper models: if Opus 4.7 primary flakes, fall back to 4.6 before anything smaller.

compaction._comment: Keep compaction on a cheap, fast, non-reasoning model. Never share a key with the chat provider.

embedding._comment: Local Ollama is the right default. Switch to `copilot` (2026.4.15-beta.1+) only if your org already pays for Copilot Business/Enterprise.

contextPruning._comment: Stops SOUL+AGENTS+MEMORY re-injection every turn. Single biggest latency win on frontier models.

compaction._comment: Cap is auto-applied in 2026.4.15+ (to the model context window). Setting it explicitly anyway is belt-and-suspenders.

storage._comment: 2026.4.15 stable default. Phase blocks land in memory/dreaming/{phase}/YYYY-MM-DD.md. Flip to `inline` if you want them in the daily memory file.
Switch to `cloud` with S3-compatible creds if you want durable memory indexes on object storage (2026.4.15-beta.1+).

skills._comment: Auto-update ON is the sleeper-update attack. Pin specific refs: `openclaw skills install author/skill --ref v1.2.0`. See Part 23.

approvals._comment: Semantic categories replaced name-based allowlists in 2026.3.31-beta.1. See Part 24 for per-agent overrides.

auto-capture._comment: Extracts claim-named knowledge notes into vault/00_inbox/. See Part 11.
